items.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
items.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The […]

Don’t buy it. Perimenopause used to be considered taboo, but not anymore. Thanks at least in part to TV doctors and social media influencers,…

items.title: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
items.summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US spokesperson Zachary Kizer tells The Verge. YouTube has been working on a similar tool […]

items.title: Meet Kimi K3, the newest Chinese AI model haunting Silicon Valley
items.summary: Moonshot AI’s new open model is catching up to Anthropic and OpenAI, raising questions about the future of the AI race.

items.title: Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
items.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

items.title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
items.summary: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.

items.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
items.summary: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

items.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
items.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

items.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
items.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

items.title: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
items.summary: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.

items.title: Iraq and Syria sign agreement to restore oil pipeline that would provide alternative to Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is visiting the U.S. this week. He met with President Donald Trump at the White House on Tuesday.

items.title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
items.summary: The UK government said taking the firm into public hands would safeguard "a vital national capability".

items.title: Philippines condemns monkey video on Chinese media as racist
items.summary: The AI video on China Daily showed a monkey in Philippine garments singing its claims to the South China Sea.

items.title: ICE shared Medicaid data it wasn't supposed to have with Palantir
items.summary: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts.

items.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
items.summary: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.

items.title: Ex-wife says ICE agent who killed man in Maine had racist beliefs, violent tendencies
items.summary: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday.
